examples: A study on reaction kinetics of maize, lycopodium and two kinds of bituminous dust layers are presented.
Any of various mostly small vascular plants of the genus Lycopodium, often resembling mosses and reproducing by spores.
ObjectiveTo study the optimal technology of supercriticalCO2 fluid extraction(SFECO2) on Lycopodium japonicum Thunb. and validate the drug action of extract.
